name: Flightradar24 MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Flightradar24 MCP server enabling AI agents to access real-time flight tracking data — querying live aircraft positions, retrieving flight information and route details, tracking specific flights or aircraft, and integrating Flightradar24's comprehensive aviation data into agent-driven flight monitoring and travel information workflows.
use_cases: Tracking live aircraft positions from aviation monitoring agents
Retrieving real-time flight status and delays from travel assistant agents
Monitoring specific aircraft or airlines from logistics agents
Querying flights over a geographic area from geographic analysis agents
Tracking arrival and departure times from travel planning agents
Building aviation intelligence reports from aviation research agents
not_for: Flight booking (tracking only, no booking capability)
Historical flight data beyond Flightradar24's retention period
Teams without Flightradar24 Business API access
best_when: An agent needs real-time flight tracking data from Flightradar24 — for aviation monitoring, travel assistance, or logistics applications requiring live aircraft positions.
avoid_when: You need flight booking, historical archive data, or don't have a Flightradar24 Business API subscription.

auth.notes: Flightradar24 Business API key required. Available via Flightradar24 Business API subscription. API key passed as environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: None — Flightradar24 Business API is paid
pricing.paid_tiers: Flightradar24 Business API: custom pricing based on usage
pricing.notes: Flightradar24 Business API is commercial with custom pricing. No free tier for programmatic access. Official MCP server from Flightradar24 is open source and free.

performance.rate_limits: Flightradar24 API: rate limits per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: Flightradar24 Business API subscription required — significant cost for commercial use
Official MCP from Flightradar24 org — higher quality and reliability than community MCPs
API data is real-time — rate limits apply and must be respected
Flight data accuracy: ADS-B based, coverage varies by region and aircraft transponder
Aircraft with MLAT-only tracking may have less accurate positions
API terms of service restrict data redistribution — review for your use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR compliant (EU-based). Official Flightradar24 MCP. Store API key as environment variable. Respect Flightradar24 API ToS for data use and redistribution.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. GDPR. Official Flightradar24 MCP. Store key securely. Respect ToS for data redistribution.
